---
title: "SPASAM MSE test pages"
output: html_document
---

<!-- ADD LINKS BELOW, note, using the RMD link syntax will open the presentation in the same tab, which is annoying. Use the html with the "_blank" to fix that behavior -->
 
<button>
    <a href="https:/github.com/sgaichas/spasam-mse-test"> A sandbox for WHAM based MSEs </a>
</button>

## MSE pages

<a href="https://sgaichas.github.io/spasam-mse-test/TestInstallation.html" target="_blank">The basic MSE workflow works - June 22 2026</a> 

<a href="https://sgaichas.github.io/spasam-mse-test/SummerFlounderTest.html" target="_blank">Can we make a summer flounder OM? WIP- June 23 2026</a>
